scripts.build:dev: npm run clean && npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.dev: npm run build:dev && npm run start
scripts.dev:watch: nodemon --watch src --ext ts,html,css,js --exec "npm run build:dev && npm run start"
scripts.clean:deep: rm -rf dist node_modules package-lock.json && npm install
scripts.type-check: npm run type-check:backend && npm run type-check:frontend
scripts.testorig: npm run build:dev && npm run test:frontend
scripts.validate: npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run test
